title: Claude 2026 Prompting and Claude Code Practice · Contract Clinic: Claude Code Context
summary: Apply current Anthropic guidance to tool use, examples, context, and long-running coding. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt claude code context increment in a Claude-specific prompt and eval suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Provide Claude Code repository guidance, verification commands, permissions, and durable project context.
Match adaptive or extended thinking to complex tasks without demanding verbose reasoning output.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Claude Code Context evidence
